# Task DB Plane Migration Scope

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerintegrationgatedocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to integration gates](../integration-gates.md)

Task DB plane adapts the local `riido-task-db.v1` file into agentbridge control-plane ports.

- `internal/taskdb` owns schema, guarded mutation, command-id idempotent replay, and validation evidence receipts.
- `internal/agentbridge/controlplane/taskdbplane` owns runtime registry and lease sidecars.
- Lease ID, fencing token, and capability fingerprint are required to report terminal task state.
